hero.title: Informed decisions in
hero.subtitle: We help you understand the economic situation so you can make your decisions with more and better information.

services.title: What services do we provide?
services.subtitle: We offer a comprehensive set of services to keep you informed about the economic and financial situation.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Weekly reports addressing the main topics of economic situation.
reports.extra: Includes special reports with urgent topics or relevant international events.

support.title: Technical support
support.description: Private communication channel for technical queries about report topics.
support.extra: Possibility to suggest new relevant topics for the reports.

presentations.title: Presentations
presentations.description: In-person or virtual talks with LLZ members.
presentations.extra: Priority in rates and schedule for clients with contracted report service.

analysis.title: In-depth economic analysis
analysis.subtitle: At LLZ we specialize in providing detailed and understandable analysis of the macroeconomic, financial and monetary policy situation.

economic.title: Economic situation
economic.description: Updated analysis of the national and international economic situation

monetary.title: Monetary policy
monetary.description: Monitoring of decisions and trends in monetary policy

markets.title: International markets
markets.description: Coverage of relevant events in global markets

cta.title: Ready to make better decisions?
cta.subtitle: Contact us to learn more about our services and how we can help you better understand the economy.

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: Specialized consulting in macro, finance and monetary policy

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.p1: At LLZ we are dedicated to providing high-quality economic analysis that allows our clients to make informed decisions in a constantly changing environment.
mission.p2: Our approach focuses on clarity and depth of analysis, translating macroeconomic complexity into actionable information for investors, companies and financial sector professionals.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the reference consulting firm in macroeconomic analysis, recognized for the accuracy of our reports and the quality of our personalized service.

approach.title: Our Approach
approach.description: We combine technical rigor with expository clarity, delivering in-depth analysis that is both accurate and understandable for our clients.

team.title: Who we are
team.subtitle: Team of professionals with extensive experience in economic and financial analysis

member1.name: Luciano Laspina
member1.description: Specialist in monetary policy and financial markets with over 10 years of experience.

member2.name: Lucas Laspina
member2.description: Expert in macroeconomic situation and international market analysis.

member3.name: Ezequiel Zarate
member3.description: Specialized in sectoral analysis and regional economic trends.

investors.title: Investors
investors.description: Market and situation analysis for investment decisions

companies.title: Companies
companies.description: Strategic information for planning and risk management

professionals.title: Professionals
professionals.description: Specialized content for analysts and financial consultants

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Interested in our services? Contact us and we will respond shortly.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: Welcome to LLZ macro y finanzas. By using our services, you accept the following terms and conditions.

services.title: 1. Services
services.description: LLZ provides economic consulting services, analysis reports and presentations. The content is informative in nature and does not constitute personalized financial advice.

use.title: 2. Use of Content
use.description: The content provided is for the exclusive use of the contracting client. Its reproduction, distribution or commercial use without express authorization is prohibited.

responsibility.title: 3. Responsibility
responsibility.description: The analysis and opinions expressed are informative in nature. Investment decisions are the sole responsibility of the user.

payment.title: 4. Payments and Billing
payment.description: Services are billed according to the contracted plan. Payment must be made under the terms agreed upon at the time of contracting.

modifications.title: 5. Modifications
modifications.description: We reserve the right to modify these terms. Changes will be notified to clients in advance.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At LLZ we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data.

collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
collection.description: We collect information you provide when contacting us or hiring our services: name, email, company and contact details.

use.title: 2. Use of Information
use.description: We use your information to: provide our services, communicate with you, send contracted reports and improve our services.

protection.title: 3. Data Protection
protection.description: We implement security measures to protect your information. We do not share your data with third parties without your consent.

rights.title: 4. Your Rights
rights.description: You have the right to access, rectify or delete your personal data. Contact us to exercise these rights.

cookies.title: 5. Cookies
cookies.description: We use cookies to improve the user experience. You can configure your browser to reject them.

contact.title: 6. Contact
contact.description: For privacy inquiries, contact us at: contacto@llz.com.ar
